tamarin_model.theory_code:
theory On_Off_Cluster_Matter
begin

// Cluster: On/Off Cluster
// Cluster ID: 0x0006
// Category: Application
// Source: FSM JSON model
// Generated: 2025-11-17T02:15:37.818848
// Extraction method: AI_behavioral_analysis, section 1.5, pages 64-74
// NOTE: This theory models the FSM structurally and with abstracted data domains
// (e.g., timer values) but without concrete uint16 arithmetic.

// We use a single unified cluster state fact:
//   St_Cluster(tid, state, OnOff, OnTime, OffWaitTime, GlobalSceneControl,
//              LT_feature, OFFONLY_feature, AcceptOnlyWhenOn, TimerMode)
//
// - tid: thread identifier
// - state: one of st_OffState, st_OnState, st_TimedOnState, st_DelayedOffState
// - OnOff: bool_false | bool_true
// - OnTime: val0 | pos16 | max16   (0, >0 & !=0xFFFF, 0xFFFF)
// - OffWaitTime: val0 | pos16 | max16
// - GlobalSceneControl: bool_false | bool_true
// - LT_feature: f_noLT | f_LT
// - OFFONLY_feature: f_noOFFONLY | f_OFFONLY
// - AcceptOnlyWhenOn: aoo_disabled | aoo_enabled
// - TimerMode: t_off | t_on        (abstract periodic timer state)

builtins: hashing

// Symbols for abstract domains and command/attribute identifiers
functions:
  // States
  st_OffState/0
  st_OnState/0
  st_TimedOnState/0
  st_DelayedOffState/0

  // Booleans
  bool_false/0
  bool_true/0

  // Abstract uint16 buckets
  val0/0       // = 0
  pos16/0      // >0 and != 0xFFFF
  max16/0      // = 0xFFFF

  // Feature flags
  f_noLT/0
  f_LT/0
  f_noOFFONLY/0
  f_OFFONLY/0

  // OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn bit
  aoo_disabled/0
  aoo_enabled/0

  // Timer mode (periodic 1/10s)
  t_off/0      // timer not running
  t_on/0       // timer running

  // Command tags
  cmd_Off/0
  cmd_On/0
  cmd_Toggle/0
  cmd_OffWithEffect/0
  cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene/0
  cmd_OnWithTimedOff/0
  cmd_TimerTick/0

  // Attributes identifiers for AttrUpdated action fact
  attr_OnOff/0
  attr_OnTime/0
  attr_OffWaitTime/0
  attr_GlobalSceneControl/0

  // Scene identifiers
  scene_global/0

// Predicate declarations (facts)
facts:
  // Main cluster state
  St_Cluster/10

  // Observational/action facts
  Command/2               // Command(tid, cmd)
  StateChange/3           // StateChange(tid, fromState, toState)
  AttrUpdated/3           // AttrUpdated(tid, attr, newVal)
  TimerStarted/1          // TimerStarted(tid)
  TimerStopped/1          // TimerStopped(tid)
  TimerTick/1             // TimerTick(tid)
  TimerExpired/1          // TimerExpired(tid)
  SceneStored/2           // SceneStored(tid, scene)
  SceneRecalled/2         // SceneRecalled(tid, scene)
  GlobalSceneControlCleared/1 // GlobalSceneControlCleared(tid)
  ClusterInit/1           // Initialization marker

// === INITIALIZATION ===
// Initial state: OffState, with attributes at their default values:
// OnOff = FALSE, OnTime = 0, OffWaitTime = 0, GlobalSceneControl = TRUE,
// LT feature: abstract (here we leave it symbolic), OFFONLY: abstract,
// AcceptOnlyWhenOn: disabled, TimerMode: off.

rule Init_On_Off_Cluster:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid,
               st_OffState,
               bool_false,   // OnOff = FALSE
               val0,         // OnTime = 0
               val0,         // OffWaitTime = 0
               bool_true,    // GlobalSceneControl = TRUE (default)
               f_LT,         // assume LT feature supported (can be varied in other traces)
               f_noOFFONLY,  // assume OFFONLY not supported by default
               aoo_disabled, // AcceptOnlyWhenOn = 0
               t_off) ]      // TimerMode = off

// =============================================================================
// === TRANSITIONS FROM FSM ====================================================
// =============================================================================
// NOTE ON ABSTRACTION:
// - LT-conditional updates are guarded on LT_feature = f_LT.
// - Arithmetic like OnTime := OnTime - 1 is abstracted with symbolic buckets:
//   we represent timer progress using TimerTick and TimerExpired actions and
//   nondeterministic switching from pos16 to val0, not exact counting.
// - 0xFFFF (disabled) is represented by max16 and is left unchanged by ticks.

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Off command (guard: true)
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// OnState -> OffState, OffState -> OffState, TimedOnState -> OffState,
// DelayedOffState -> OffState
// Actions: OnOff := FALSE; if LT supported then OnTime := 0; in TimedOn/DelayedOff
// also stop_periodic_timer().

rule Off_from_OnState_to_OffState:
  let
    newOnTime = (case lt of
                    f_LT -> val0
                  | f_noLT -> onTime
                 )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Off),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule Off_from_TimedOnState_to_OffState:
  let
    newOnTime = (case lt of
                    f_LT -> val0
                  | f_noLT -> onTime
                 )
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Off),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule Off_from_DelayedOffState_to_OffState:
  let
    newOnTime = (case lt of
                    f_LT -> val0
                  | f_noLT -> onTime
                 )
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Off),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule Off_from_OffState_to_OffState:
  let
    newOnTime = (case lt of
                    f_LT -> val0
                  | f_noLT -> onTime
                 )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Off),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// On command (guard: NOT OFFONLY feature is supported)
//   i.e., OFFONLY_feature = f_noOFFONLY
//   Actions: OnOff := TRUE;
//            if LT & OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

rule On_from_OffState_to_OnState:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_On),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]

rule On_from_DelayedOffState_to_OnState:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newTimer = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_On),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule On_from_OnState_to_OnState:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_On),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]

rule On_from_TimedOnState_to_TimedOnState:
  let
    // In TimedOnState the spec's conditional reset OffWaitTime only if OnTime == 0.
    // But invariant requires OnTime > 0, so condition is false; we keep OffWaitTime.
    newOffWait = offWait
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_On),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_TimedOnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Toggle command (guard: NOT OFFONLY feature is supported)
//   If currently off: turn on.
//   If currently on: turn off.
//   LT-conditional updates similar to Off/On commands.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

rule Toggle_from_OffState_to_OnState:
  let
    newOnTime = (case lt of
                    f_LT -> val0
                  | f_noLT -> onTime
                 )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Toggle),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]

rule Toggle_from_DelayedOffState_to_OnState:
  let
    newOnTime = (case lt of
                    f_LT -> val0
                  | f_noLT -> onTime
                 )
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Toggle),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule Toggle_from_OnState_to_OffState:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Toggle),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]

rule Toggle_from_TimedOnState_to_OffState:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newTimer = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_Toggle),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, f_noOFFONLY, aoo, newTimer) ]

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// OffWithEffect command (guard: LT feature IS supported)
//   Actions:
//     If GlobalSceneControl == TRUE then store current settings in global scene,
//       set GlobalSceneControl := FALSE.
//     OnOff := FALSE.
//     If LT feature is supported then OnTime := 0.
//   Transitions: OnState->OffState, TimedOnState->OffState,
//                OffState->OffState, DelayedOffState->OffState.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

// We split each case on GlobalSceneControl to explicitly model scene storage.

rule OffWithEffect_from_OnState_to_OffState_gsc_true:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
    newGsc    = bool_false
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_true,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OffState),
    SceneStored(~tid, scene_global),
    GlobalSceneControlCleared(~tid),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_OnState_to_OffState_gsc_false:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_TimedOnState_to_OffState_gsc_true:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
    newGsc    = bool_false
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_true,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OffState),
    SceneStored(~tid, scene_global),
    GlobalSceneControlCleared(~tid),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_TimedOnState_to_OffState_gsc_false:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_OffState_to_OffState_gsc_true:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
    newGsc    = bool_false
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_true,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OffState),
    SceneStored(~tid, scene_global),
    GlobalSceneControlCleared(~tid),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_OffState_to_OffState_gsc_false:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_DelayedOffState_to_OffState_gsc_true:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
    newGsc    = bool_false
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_true,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OffState),
    SceneStored(~tid, scene_global),
    GlobalSceneControlCleared(~tid),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule OffWithEffect_from_DelayedOffState_to_OffState_gsc_false:
  let
    newOnTime = val0
    newTimer  = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OffWithEffect),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, newOnTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// OnWithRecallGlobalScene command
// Guard: LT feature supported & GlobalSceneControl == FALSE
//        and recalled scene sets OnOff TRUE or FALSE
// Actions:
//   call Scenes Management cluster server.recall_global_scene()
//   OnOff := according to recalled scene
//   GlobalSceneControl := TRUE
//   If LT & OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0
// Transitions for all 4 from-states; 8 total (scene on/off).
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

// Helper: compute OffWaitTime reset
// We inline the logic in let for each rule as in other commands.

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_OffState_to_OnState_sceneOn:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OnState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_OffState_to_OffState_sceneOff:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OffState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_OnState_to_OnState_sceneOn:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OnState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_OnState_to_OffState_sceneOff:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_OffState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_TimedOnState_to_OnState_sceneOn:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
    newTimer = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OnState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_TimedOnState_to_OffState_sceneOff:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
    newTimer = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               bool_true, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OffState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_DelayedOffState_to_OnState_sceneOn:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
    newTimer = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OnState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_true),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               bool_true, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

rule OnWithRecallGlobalScene_from_DelayedOffState_to_OffState_sceneOff:
  let
    condReset = (lt = f_LT & onTime = val0)
    newOffWait = (case condReset of
                    true  -> val0
                  | false -> offWait
                  )
    newGsc = bool_true
    newTimer = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, bool_false,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OffState),
    SceneRecalled(~tid, scene_global),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, bool_false),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_GlobalSceneControl, newGsc),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStopped(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, newGsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// OnWithTimedOff command
// Guards and actions are abstracted:
//
// Reject case 1:
//   LT supported & AcceptOnlyWhenOn==1 & OnOff==FALSE
//   -> OffState or DelayedOffState remain, no changes.
//
// Reject case 2 (DelayedOff extend):
//   LT supported & AcceptOnlyWhenOn==0 & OffWaitTime>0 & OnOff==FALSE
//   -> DelayedOffState, OffWaitTime := MIN(OffWaitTime, cmd.OffWaitTime),
//      start_periodic_timer if both OnTime and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF.
//   Abstracted: we keep OffWaitTime = pos16 and set TimerMode = t_on.
//
// General case:
//   LT supported & NOT reject1 & NOT (OffWaitTime>0 & OnOff==FALSE)
//   -> To TimedOnState, OnTime := MAX(OnTime, cmd.OnTime) (abstract as pos16),
//      OffWaitTime := cmd.OffWaitTime (pos16), OnOff := TRUE,
//      start_periodic_timer if enabled.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

// Reject, OffState
rule OnWithTimedOff_reject_from_OffState:
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo_enabled, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_OffState) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo_enabled, timer) ]

// Reject, DelayedOffState (same guard)
rule OnWithTimedOff_reject_from_DelayedOffState:
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo_enabled, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_DelayedOffState) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo_enabled, timer) ]

// Extend DelayedOffState timed-off window
rule OnWithTimedOff_extend_DelayedOffState:
  let
    newOffWait = pos16
    newTimer   = (case (onTime, newOffWait) of
                    (max16, _) -> timer
                  | (_, max16) -> timer
                  | _         -> t_on
                 )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, pos16, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo_disabled, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_DelayedOffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    TimerStarted(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               bool_false, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo_disabled, newTimer) ]

// General-case: OffState -> TimedOnState
rule OnWithTimedOff_from_OffState_to_TimedOnState:
  let
    notReject1 = (aoo != aoo_enabled | on <> bool_false)
    notOffWaitGt0Off = (offWait = val0 | on <> bool_false)
    cond = (notReject1 & notOffWaitGt0Off)
    newOnTime = pos16
    newOffWait = pos16
    newOn = bool_true
    newTimer = (case (newOnTime, newOffWait) of
                  (max16, _) -> timer
                | (_, max16) -> timer
                | _         -> t_on
               )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               on, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OffState, st_TimedOnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, newOn),
    TimerStarted(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               newOn, newOnTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]
  where cond = true

// General-case: OnState -> TimedOnState
rule OnWithTimedOff_from_OnState_to_TimedOnState:
  let
    notReject1 = (aoo != aoo_enabled | on <> bool_false)
    notOffWaitGt0Off = (offWait = val0 | on <> bool_false)
    cond = (notReject1 & notOffWaitGt0Off)
    newOnTime = pos16
    newOffWait = pos16
    newOn = bool_true
    newTimer = (case (newOnTime, newOffWait) of
                  (max16, _) -> timer
                | (_, max16) -> timer
                | _         -> t_on
               )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OnState,
               on, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_OnState, st_TimedOnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, newOn),
    TimerStarted(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               newOn, newOnTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]
  where cond = true

// General-case: TimedOnState -> TimedOnState
rule OnWithTimedOff_from_TimedOnState_to_TimedOnState:
  let
    notReject1 = (aoo != aoo_enabled | on <> bool_false)
    notOffWaitGt0Off = (offWait = val0 | on <> bool_false)
    cond = (notReject1 & notOffWaitGt0Off)
    newOnTime = pos16
    newOffWait = pos16
    newOn = bool_true
    newTimer = (case (newOnTime, newOffWait) of
                  (max16, _) -> timer
                | (_, max16) -> timer
                | _         -> t_on
               )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               on, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_TimedOnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, newOn),
    TimerStarted(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               newOn, newOnTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]
  where cond = true

// General-case: DelayedOffState -> TimedOnState
rule OnWithTimedOff_from_DelayedOffState_to_TimedOnState:
  let
    notReject1 = (aoo != aoo_enabled | on <> bool_false)
    notOffWaitGt0Off = (offWait = val0 | on <> bool_false)
    cond = (notReject1 & notOffWaitGt0Off)
    newOnTime = pos16
    newOffWait = pos16
    newOn = bool_true
    newTimer = (case (newOnTime, newOffWait) of
                  (max16, _) -> timer
                | (_, max16) -> timer
                | _         -> t_on
               )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               on, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, timer) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_OnWithTimedOff),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_TimedOnState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, newOn),
    TimerStarted(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               newOn, newOnTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               f_LT, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]
  where cond = true

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Timer tick (1/10 second)
// The FSM has separate guards "OnTime > 1" vs "OnTime == 1" etc. We model
// abstractly with pos16 (active and finite) and val0 (expired).
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

// TimedOnState: decrement while OnTime > 1 (stays in TimedOnState)
rule TimerTick_TimedOnState_stay:
  let
    // abstract: stay with pos16; no change for max16 or val0
    newOnTime = (case onTime of
                   pos16 -> pos16
                 | _     -> onTime
                )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               on, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, t_on) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_TimerTick),
    TimerTick(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               on, newOnTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, t_on) ]

// TimedOnState: OnTime reaches 0 -> OffState, OffWaitTime := 0, stop timer
rule TimerExpire_TimedOnState_to_OffState:
  let
    newOnTime  = val0
    newOffWait = val0
    newOn      = bool_false
    newTimer   = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_TimedOnState,
               on, pos16, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, t_on) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_TimerTick),
    TimerTick(~tid),
    TimerExpired(~tid),
    TimerStopped(~tid),
    StateChange(~tid, st_TimedOnState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnOff, newOn),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OnTime, newOnTime),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               newOn, newOnTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

// DelayedOffState: decrement OffWaitTime while >1
rule TimerTick_DelayedOffState_stay:
  let
    newOffWait = (case offWait of
                    pos16 -> pos16
                  | _     -> offWait
                 )
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               on, onTime, offWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, t_on) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_TimerTick),
    TimerTick(~tid) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               on, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, t_on) ]

// DelayedOffState: OffWaitTime reaches 0 -> OffState, stop timer
rule TimerExpire_DelayedOffState_to_OffState:
  let
    newOffWait = val0
    newTimer   = t_off
  in
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_DelayedOffState,
               on, onTime, pos16, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, t_on) ]
--[ Command(~tid, cmd_TimerTick),
    TimerTick(~tid),
    TimerExpired(~tid),
    TimerStopped(~tid),
    StateChange(~tid, st_DelayedOffState, st_OffState),
    AttrUpdated(~tid, attr_OffWaitTime, newOffWait) ]->
  [ St_Cluster(~tid, st_OffState,
               on, onTime, newOffWait, gsc,
               lt, offonly, aoo, newTimer) ]

// =============================================================================
// === RESTRICTIONS ENCODING STATE INVARIANTS ==================================
// =============================================================================
// We encode invariants as restrictions (semantic constraints on traces).
// All restrictions use the same 10-ary St_Cluster predicate to avoid arity errors.
// Abstract timer invariants are not enforced here.

// OffState invariant:
//   OnOff == FALSE, OnTime == 0, OffWaitTime == 0
restriction inv_OffState:
  "All tid on onTime offWait gsc lt offonly aoo timer #i.
     St_Cluster(tid, st_OffState, on, onTime, offWait, gsc, lt, offonly, aoo, timer) @i
      ==> on = bool_false & onTime = val0 & offWait = val0"

// OnState invariant:
//   OnOff == TRUE, OnTime == 0, OffWaitTime == 0
restriction inv_OnState:
  "All tid on onTime offWait gsc lt offonly aoo timer #i.
     St_Cluster(tid, st_OnState, on, onTime, offWait, gsc, lt, offonly, aoo, timer) @i
      ==> on = bool_true & onTime = val0 & offWait = val0"

// TimedOnState invariant:
//   OnOff == TRUE, OnTime > 0
//   (we abstract OnTime>0 as onTime = pos16)
//   OffWaitTime is unconstrained here.
restriction inv_TimedOnState:
  "All tid on onTime offWait gsc lt offonly aoo timer #i.
     St_Cluster(tid, st_TimedOnState, on, onTime, offWait, gsc, lt, offonly, aoo, timer) @i
      ==> on = bool_true & onTime = pos16"

// DelayedOffState invariant:
//   OnOff == FALSE, OnTime == 0, OffWaitTime > 0
//   OffWaitTime > 0 is abstracted as offWait = pos16.
restriction inv_DelayedOffState:
  "All tid on onTime offWait gsc lt offonly aoo timer #i.
     St_Cluster(tid, st_DelayedOffState, on, onTime, offWait, gsc, lt, offonly, aoo, timer) @i
      ==> on = bool_false & onTime = val0 & offWait = pos16"

// =============================================================================
// === LEMMAS (EXAMPLES) =======================================================
// =============================================================================

// Example: OnWithTimedOff is only executed when LT feature is supported.
lemma OnWithTimedOff_requires_LT:
  "All tid cmd #i.
     Command(tid, cmd) @i & cmd = cmd_OnWithTimedOff
      ==> (Ex st on onTime offWait gsc lt offonly aoo timer.
              St_Cluster(tid, st, on, onTime, offWait, gsc, lt, offonly, aoo, timer) @i
              & lt = f_LT)"

// Example: TimedOnState is reachable (abstract reachability).
lemma reach_TimedOnState:
  exists-trace
  "Ex tid on onTime offWait gsc lt offonly aoo timer #i.
      St_Cluster(tid, st_TimedOnState, on, onTime, offWait, gsc, lt, offonly, aoo, timer) @i"

end
